佢雖然住係日本， 佢同條女食野都成日中伏

而且佢地唔係遊客， “平”重要過好食， 唔會好似遊客咁想食好d

佢拍呢間野 叫咗個¥3xxx既set， 兩個人食， 佢自己都話唔夠飽， 見到d肉都係好一般

我都有睇佢d片， 唔係話佢唔好， 但你要知道， 佢只係搵萬幾蚊， 仲要租屋， 生活， 佢拍d食店都唔岩遊客去既

你見佢買牛肉都去黑門市場， 都唔知佢有冇去過日本超市， 定係因為佢之前住黑門市場， 所以淨係識去個度， 黑門貴好多喎

所以去大阪， 係唔係要跟佢既介紹去食野， 就自己諗喇

I recommend dining at Ramen Menya. They serve a range of broths which pleases sophisticated palates: chicken broth, fish broth, pork bone broth, miso broth and lastly spicy broth. The spicy broth is toned down to suit the palates of the tourists so you don’t have to worry about it being too spicy. Of course they too serve food adapted for their own palates. The richness of broths is outstanding which can tempt demanding palates. The noodle texture is perfect which pleases the most refined palate. I highly recommend it. BBQ Fuji is also worth trying. They serve the best quality of meat 🥩 in japan 🇯🇵 You can choose any cuts of beef you like for barbecue. I’m sure you have a discriminating palate😊Their meat texture is of high quality that pleases the most refined palate. Their barbecue equipment is of top quality as the food doesn’t stick to the grill. It’s not like ordinary grills on which you try to flip meat 🥩 and it won’t come loose. It sticks and tears, makes a mess and results in dry burnt meat. Their barbecue solved this problem.

I heartily recommend that you should try Ramen Menya in osaka. I remember the table was sticky maybe because the staff forgot to wipe it up so I asked them to wipe it up. Later I spilt a bowl of soup all over my shirt so I had to wipe up the spilled soup🤣 I had a nice chat with a lady sitting at a nearby table who told me in centuries past a whole village was wiped out by a catastrophic earthquake. Fascinating. When I finished my meal u wiped my mouth on my sleeve lol and a tissue. I remember a decade.ago there was a protest where the protestors clashed with the police in osaka. I saw it on NHK then. I thought the police were not tough enough. All thr riot police were holding a shield in one hand and a truncheon in the other hand. In this way you can't really fight the protestors and arrest them since you have no free hands to get hold of them. That's why it took four policemen to catch hold of one demonstrator. From a fighting perspective, some of the riot police should be holding just a shield, some just a nightstick, the other both. And all of them should be trained on how they fight when they're holding just a shield, holding just a baton and holding both. It was complete chaos. I didn't think Osaka had ever been so disastrous before. The police who I wholeheartedly supported only used tear gas in an attempt to disperse the protestors which was utterly not enough. The police shouldn't have been afraid of being criticized for using excessive force because this was utterly not the case. Firing rubber bullets and bean bags at the demonstrators was necessary, lawful and appropriate. Those who sabotaged the nearby buildings and the railings should've been thrown in prison. The United states had already imposed trade sanctions on japan at that time. The then US president said he would take punitive action against japan if the police there used excessive force. Japan was afraid that America would toughen punitive import duties still further on alcohol, agricultural products, food and clothes, and worse still they would convince the other nations to impose international economic sanctions against the country. Of course the downside was the costs of the products in America which they had imposed import tariffs on would rise still higher. The economic sanctions against japan wouldn't be lifted until the then United states president's term of office expired.two hears later. The next day everybody was warned to stay away from the place because there would be violent clashes but it turned out to be a false alarm. There were half as many people on the street. However as long as you kept up with the news and stayed away from places where there were protests or was safe in osaka. In the same evening a bus crash killed sixteen passengers. Detectives assigned the blame for the bus accident to a hailstorm and heavy snowfalls-and then a brutal murder took place in the capital. Detectives assigned jealousy and hatred as the motives for the horrendous crime. There's a pageant of which the final round will take place in osaka next month. I would've thought Aiko seems highly likely to enter the final round.  My friend Joe has received a commission to compose a waltz for the pageant as one of the contestants will be showcasing her waltz dance whjxg we all can't wait to see. Let me offer Joe my congratulations for having accepted a commission for a waltz from the pageant as it's a rare opportunity. I too endorse the congratulations to my friend Fumi on having progressed through the preliminary round. She's a contestant in the beauty contest and I won't be surprised if she progresses through the semifinal.

食完千里 個麵係全場亮點 用靚清水涮真係好奢華

あぶりや 國產牛燒肉
http://www.1dining.co.jp/shop/aburiya/
日文網站可以網上預約，當日預約一定無位，早預約會多D時間揀
用英文名，最少預約2人，852+香港電話號碼，電郵
識日文可以去Hot Pepper訂，訂枱後有積分，之後再訂枱可當錢扣
試過去偏少少分店及剛開門的話可以walk in，一個人食都無問題
小學生以下及50歳以上都有價錢優惠價
Hot Pepper內有優惠券show俾待應就可5,000円包飲料連稅
D肉唔太肥，肉質唔錯，第一次由待應落單，之後可以用平版下單有中英文，待應很主動提議換燒肉網

焼肉力丸 D肉較多油脂，食幾舊就會開始漏，室內好大油煙食完好大陣味，有唔同價格選擇，有平有貴，試過晚飯時間walk in都可以直接入座，離座時見佢個訂枱板都幾爆吓

兩間燒肉放題肉的質素都唔錯，而且300蚊內的價錢真係好抵食

quote.msg:
あぶりや 國產牛燒肉
http://www.1dining.co.jp/shop/aburiya/
日文網站可以網上預約，當日預約一定無位，早預約會多D時間揀
用英文名，最少預約2人，852+香港電話號碼，電郵
識日文可以去Hot Pepper訂，訂枱後有積分，之後再訂枱可當錢扣
試過去偏少少分店及剛開門的話可以walk in，一個人食都無問題
小學生以下及50歳以上都有價錢優惠價
Hot Pepper內有優惠券show俾待應就可5,000円包飲料連稅
D肉唔太肥，肉質唔錯，第一次由待應落單，之後可以用平版下單有中英文，待應很主動提議換燒肉網

焼肉力丸 D肉較多油脂，食幾舊就會開始漏，室內好大油煙食完好大陣味，有唔同價格選擇，有平有貴，試過晚飯時間walk in都可以直接入座，離座時見佢個訂枱板都幾爆吓

兩間燒肉放題肉的質素都唔錯，而且300蚊內的價錢真係好抵食
如果環境及招呼的話，肯定係"あぶりや 國產牛燒肉"好D

可能我垃圾口,早排試完八尾 Manger覺得都係OK
講返餐飯先,個晚叫左個豬扒炸蝦SET,個豬扒有少少overcook比較鞋口同冇乜肉汁,但都算好食既,係冇乜驚喜囉.至於隻蝦都係不過不失,隻蝦肉質偏霉,但我覺得已經比豬扒好食.
成個SET最有驚喜反而係個麵豉湯,佢應該加左少少花椒係入面,有少少麻麻地,幾開胃.
BTW,師傅比人既感覺係唔憂做,唔多想做遊客生意加上坐得都好逼下,成餐飯總結黎講唔算太好既體驗

I heartily recommend Ramen Menya near Osaka station. They provide a range of broths to please sophisticated palates including pork bone broth, chicken broth, fish broth and spicy broth. The spicy broth is toned down to suit the palates of the tourists so you don't have to worry about it being too spicy. Of course they too serve food adsoted for their own palate. The richness of broth is outstanding that can tempt demanding palates. The noodle texture is perfect which will please the most refined palate. I thoroughly recommend it.
